Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's Motion For Protective Order To Limit Written Discovery Propounded By Plaintiff is GRANTED as follows: (1)Plaintiff must pick no more than ten of the following requests for admissions from his Requests for Admissions - Truth of Facts, Set Two: Request Nos. 9 through 14, 24 through 29, 30 through 66, & 81 through 101. And (4) Prana Eight need not respond to any of Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories - Set Two, except for Form Interrogatory 17.1 with respect to denials made by Prana Eight of the no more than ten requests for admissions chosen by Plaintiff from the list given in Paragraph A, above.
